molten_core.name: Molten Core
molten_core.description: A shard of living magma. Fire Potions deal +8 damage.

guardian_idol.name: Guardian Idol
guardian_idol.description: An ancient ward. Start every battle with 10 shield.

chrono_amulet.name: Chrono Amulet
chrono_amulet.description: Time bends around you. Enemies need 1 extra move to attack.
